seoTitle: How to Add Spotify Songs to a Canva Presentation
metaDescription: Learn how to bring Spotify music into a Canva presentation to add a soundtrack that boosts engagement.
intro: Adding the right music can turn a static presentation into something more memorable. This tutorial shows how to access Spotify's music library within Canva and add a song to your presentation slides.

steps.heading: Access Spotify within Canva
steps.body: Open the audio or music panel in Canva that connects to Spotify's library.

steps.heading: Search for and select a song
steps.body: Browse or search for the track you want and add it to your presentation.

steps.heading: Follow the upload process
steps.body: Place the selected song onto your presentation timeline so it plays alongside your slides.

steps.heading: Choose music that fits your content
steps.body: Pick a track whose tone matches your presentation's purpose, whether it's a business pitch or a social post.

faq.question: Do I need a Spotify account to add music to my Canva presentation?
faq.answer: You may need to connect a Spotify account or use Canva's integrated music library depending on how the feature is set up.

faq.question: Can I use any Spotify song for a business presentation?
faq.answer: Licensing can vary, so it's worth checking usage rights, especially for presentations shared publicly or used commercially.

faq.question: Can I trim the song to only play during part of my presentation?
faq.answer: Yes, Canva generally lets you adjust the timing and length of the audio track within your presentation.

faq.question: Will the music play automatically when I present?
faq.answer: Yes, once added to your presentation timeline, the music should play as part of your slideshow.
